arts.ttl: Maresca hails Sancho after Chelsea win
arts.sum: Chelsea reaction. The post Maresca hails Sancho after Chelsea win appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca aims subtle dig at Erik ten Hag as Jadon Sancho shines on his Chelsea debut after nightmare Man United spell
arts.sum: The winger had endured a torrid time at United after falling out with ten Hag and spent the second half of last season on loan at Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca hails impact of Jadon Sancho after Chelsea’s win at Bournemouth
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho marked his first Premier League appearance in 12 months with an assist on his Chelsea debut.

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Bournemouth set new Premier League record after super-sub gives Blues win
arts.sum: BOURNEMOUTH 0-1 CHELSEA: Bournemouth were made to pay for a first-half penalty miss as substitute Christopher Nkunku scored a late winner for Chelsea on the south coast

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer and Noni Madueke drop early Chelsea team news hint as Enzo Maresca plan clear
arts.sum: Cole Palmer and Noni Madueke have dropped an early team news hint ahead of Chelsea's clash against Bournemouth. "I think the three Premier League games that we played, it's true we conceded goals but it's also true that we conceded the first shot on goal against Palace and that was the goal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea player ratings vs Bournemouth as Nkunku makes impact and Sancho assists
arts.sum: Chelsea did have a couple of openings on goal, with Nicolas Jackson seeing a shot at the near post saved by Mark Travers. They did manage to find the crucial breakthrough with time running out as substitute Christopher Nkunku took in Sancho's pass and turned superbly before calmly finding the bottom corner.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca vindicated as first big summer call pays off and Jadon Sancho hits at another
arts.sum: Picking first-choice keeper was a bold decision, but one already vindicated

arts.ttl: Chelsea must make 'irresistible' bid to sign star who is desperate to join
arts.sum: Romano confirmed the long-standing interest of Tottenham and Chelsea, with the latter a particularly interesting potential destination as Dorgu is a boyhood Blues fan. Chelsea will have to make an 'irresistible' offer for Patrick Dorgu if they want to get Lecce to sell, according to a report.

arts.ttl: 'Amazing': Jadon Sancho reacts after debut performance in Chelsea's win over Bournemouth
arts.sum: Chelsea secured a dramatic late win over Bournemouth on Saturday night, which must have been extra special for Jadon Sancho on his debut for the...

arts.ttl: Nkunku and Sancho combine to give Chelsea win at unlucky Bournemouth
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku stepped off the bench and combined with debutant Jadon Sancho to deliver a 1-0 victory for Chelsea at Bournemouth.
